# openshift_mirror_registry (Resource)

Sets up a local mirror registry for disconnected OpenShift installation.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String) FQDN of the registry host.
- `storage_dir` (String) Local directory for registry storage.

### Optional

- `init_password` (String, Sensitive) Initial registry admin password.
- `init_user` (String) Initial registry admin username.
- `port` (Number) Registry port.
- `quay_root` (String) Quay root installation directory (for type=quay).
- `tls_cert_file` (String) Path to TLS certificate file (PEM). If omitted, a self-signed cert is generated.
- `tls_key_file` (String) Path to TLS private key file (PEM).
- `type` (String) Registry type: 'quay' (mirror-registry) or 'docker'.

### Read-Only

- `ca_cert` (String) PEM-encoded CA certificate for the registry TLS (self-signed if generated).
- `registry_url` (String) Full registry URL (e.g. registry.example.com:5000).
